# Template repository

This repo is a GitHub **template**. Click *Use this template* to start a new app,
then run `pwsh scripts/init-project.ps1 -AppName "MyApp" -Uid 0xE1234567`.

There is no CI workflow: the Qt 4.7.4 / Symbian SDK toolchain cannot run on
hosted runners. Build and verify locally on Windows with the Qt SDK installed.
